title: UIAO Workspace Contract Schema
description: Binds the local developer workspace to the canonical GitHub monorepo: root paths, module paths, drift-scan roots, and build-output locations. Consumed by repo-walker and drift tooling so local invocations are deterministic regardless of operator host.

root_env.description: Environment variable holding the absolute local workspace root. Never hardcode the path value.

module_paths.description: Repo-relative paths to each module root. Keys must match module names declared in substrate-manifest.yaml. Post-ADR-032 the canonical set is `uiao`, `tests`, `docs`, `scripts`, `inbox`, `deploy`; additional keys are permitted so the schema does not need editing every time a new top-level module is introduced.

drift_scan_roots.description: Repo-relative paths the drift detector walks. Must subset module_paths.

build_outputs.description: Repo-relative build/rendered-output paths. All must be .gitignore'd; tools emit here and never commit.

canon_consumer_rule.description: Path to the canon-consumer rule that forbids hardcoded canon paths. Post-ADR-032 the rule ships inside the package.
